hooks.command: $json = $input | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $json.tool_input.file_path; if ($f -and $f -like '*ai-healthcare-appointment*' -and $f -notlike '*CLAUDE.md*') { Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A project file was just modified. If this change affects deployment, AWS infrastructure, URLs, environment variables, database schema, or project architecture — update CLAUDE.md to keep it accurate."}}' }
